# Controlweave Community Edition - Allowlist
# 
# This allowlist defines which files are included in the community/open source repository.
# ONLY community-tier features are included. NO references to paid tiers, billing, or premium features.
# 
# Included Features (COMMUNITY TIER ONLY):
# - Core compliance management (frameworks, controls, implementations)
# - Assessment workflows and procedures
# - Auditor workspace
# - User and role management (basic)
# - Policy and POAM tracking
# - Basic AI-powered analysis (with user-provided API keys)
# - Audit logging and notifications
# - REST API and MCP server
#
# Excluded Features (PAID / PREMIUM):
# - Tier policies and billing logic
# - Platform admin controls (feature flags, subscription management, trial control)
# - Asset management (CMDB)
# - SBOM/AIBOM tracking
# - Vulnerability management
# - Threat intelligence (MITRE ATT&CK, MAESTRO, MAS TRM)
# - Vendor security monitoring
# - Advanced integrations (SSO, SIEM, Splunk)
# - Real-time features dashboard
# - Trial and subscription management
# - Stripe billing integration
# - All tier-gated navigation and UI components

# ============================================
# GitHub Workflows
# ============================================
# NOTE: .github/workflows/ files CANNOT be mirrored via PAT without the
# `workflow` scope, so pushing them would be rejected by GitHub.
# EXCLUDED: .github/workflows/cla.yml (CLA removed from public mirror)

# ============================================
# Top-level Documentation
# ============================================
README_COMMUNITY.md
LICENSE
QUICK_START_COMMUNITY.md
.gitignore

# ============================================
# Community Edition Documentation
# ============================================
COMMUNITY_EDITION.md

# ============================================
# Public Documentation
# ============================================
docs/openapi.yaml
docs/MCP_SETUP.md
docs/SELF_HOSTED_INSTALL.md
# EXCLUDED: docs/CLA.md, CONTRIBUTING.md (CLA removed from public mirror)

# ============================================
# Backend - Core Files
# ============================================
backend/package.json

# ============================================
# Backend - Migrations (All)
# ============================================
# ALL migration files from the private repo are included.
#
# Rationale: re-running migrations is safe via two mechanisms: (1) the migration
# runner tracks applied filenames in the schema_migrations table and skips files
# already recorded; (2) MIGRATION_BASELINE_ON_ERROR (default: true) auto-baselines
# any "already exists" error so a partial prior run does not block a fresh run.
# Including paid-tier migrations on a community deployment is therefore safe —
# the extra tables and columns simply exist unused.  EXCLUDING them is dangerous:
# foreign-key chains mean migration N can reference a table created by migration
# M < N; if M is absent the entire migration run fails and the community deployment
# never starts.
#
# The sync workflow performs a full force-push rebuild on every run, so only files
# that physically exist in this (private) repo and are listed here end up in the
# public mirror.  The previous individual entries (002–026) referenced file names
# that do NOT exist in this repo; they were silently absent from every mirror build.
# Using the glob below syncs all actual files automatically.
backend/migrations/**

# ============================================
# Backend - Configuration
# ============================================
backend/src/server.js
backend/src/config/database.js
backend/src/config/security.js
# NOTE: tierPolicy.js EXCLUDED - community doesn't need tier logic

# ============================================
# Backend - Middleware
# ============================================
backend/src/middleware/edition.js
backend/src/middleware/rateLimit.js
backend/src/middleware/performanceMonitoring.js
backend/src/middleware/validate.js
backend/src/middleware/requestContext.js
backend/src/middleware/auditLog.js
backend/src/middleware/sod.js
# NOTE: auth.js EXCLUDED - contains tier checking logic
# - emergencyMode.js (@tier annotation: platform)

# ============================================
# Backend - Routes (Community Features Only)
# ============================================
backend/src/routes/ai.js
backend/src/routes/assessments.js
backend/src/routes/audit.js
backend/src/routes/auditFields.js
backend/src/routes/auditorWorkspace.js
backend/src/routes/auth.js

backend/src/routes/implementations.js
backend/src/routes/license.js
backend/src/routes/notifications.js
backend/src/routes/ops.js
backend/src/routes/organizations.js
backend/src/routes/performance.js
backend/src/routes/poam.js
backend/src/routes/policies.js
backend/src/routes/roles.js

backend/src/routes/webhooks.js
backend/src/routes/help.js
backend/src/routes/issueReport.js
backend/src/routes/openclawWebhook.js
backend/src/routes/totp.js

# EXCLUDED ROUTES (Paid Tier Features):
# - passkeys.js (Enterprise+ — PASSKEY_TIER = 'enterprise', every endpoint is tier-gated)
# - platformAdmin.js (SECURITY: platform admin endpoints, credential provisioning, feature flags, subscription control)
# - aiGovernance.js (Enterprise+)
# - aiMonitoring.js (Pro+)
# - assets.js (Pro+, CMDB)
# - billing.js (Stripe integration)
# - cmdb.js (Pro+)
# - dashboard.js (has tier checks)
# - dataGovernance.js (Enterprise+)
# - dataSovereignty.js (Enterprise+)
# - environments.js (Pro+)
# - evidence.js (Pro+, advanced features)
# - externalAi.js (Enterprise+)
# - externalAiKeys.js (references tiers)
# - integrationsHub.js (may reference paid integrations)
# - internationalAiLaws.js (Gov Cloud tier — paid)
# - orgSettings.js (has tier/billing settings)
# - phase6.js (unknown - exclude to be safe)
# - rag.js (Enterprise+)
# - realtime.js (Enterprise+)
# - regulatoryNews.js (Pro+)
# - reports.js (Pro+)
# - rmf.js (Enterprise+, framework-gated)
# - sbom.js (Enterprise+)
# - serviceAccounts.js (Enterprise+)
# - siem.js (Enterprise+)
# - splunk.js (Pro+)
# - sso.js (Pro+)
# - stateAiLaws.js (Gov Cloud tier — paid)
# - threatIntel.js (Enterprise+)
# - tprm.js (Enterprise+)
# - vendorSecurity.js (Enterprise+)
# - vulnerabilities.js (Pro+)
# - billing-routes.js (@tier annotation: pro)
# - contacts.js (@tier annotation: pro)
# - publicContact.js (@tier annotation: exclude)
# - tprmPublic.js (@tier annotation: enterprise)
# - autoEvidenceCollection.js (@tier annotation: pro)
# - pendingEvidence.js (@tier annotation: pro)
# - plot4ai.js (@tier annotation: pro)

# Backend - Services (Community Only)
# ============================================
backend/src/services/auditService.js

backend/src/services/webhookService.js
backend/src/services/websocketService.js
backend/src/services/modelRouter.js

# EXCLUDED SERVICES (Paid Features):
# - llmService.js (contains MITRE ATT&CK, MAESTRO, MAS TRM — paid AI frameworks)
# - orgContextService.js (contains MAS TRM injection — paid regulatory feature)
# - orgRagService.js (Enterprise+ RAG feature)
# - alienVaultService.js (Threat intel)
# - cisaKevService.js (Vulnerability tracking)
# - geolocationService.js (May be data sovereignty)
# - mitreService.js (Threat intel)
# - nvdService.js (Vulnerability tracking)
# - passkeyService.js (Enterprise+ — serves only the enterprise-tier passkeys route)
# - realtimeEventService.js (Enterprise+)
# - regulatoryImpactService.js (Regulatory news)
# - regulatoryNewsService.js (Pro+)
# - reminderService.js (imports subscriptionService — billing dependency, will crash on load)
# - sbomService.js (Enterprise+)
# - siemService.js (Enterprise+)
# - splunkService.js (Pro+)
# - ssoService.js (Pro+)
# - stripeService.js (Billing)
# - subscriptionService.js (Billing/tiers)
# - threatIntelService.js (Enterprise+)
# - vendorSecurityService.js (Enterprise+)
# - multiAgentOrchestrator.js (@tier annotation: enterprise)
# - reasoningMemory.js (@tier annotation: enterprise)
# - approvalService.js (@tier annotation: platform)

# - dashboard/plot4ai/** (@tier annotation: pro)

# ============================================
# Frontend - Components (Shared)
# ============================================
frontend/src/components/AICopilot.tsx
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx
# NOTE: Sidebar.tsx contains Platform Admin nav links but they are guarded by
# isPlatformAdmin() — community users cannot see them and the admin pages are excluded.

# ============================================
# Frontend - Lib/Utils
# ============================================
# NOTE: api.ts and access.ts are included because they are required for core community
# functionality (authentication, basic tier checks, API calls). The platformAdminAPI
# methods in api.ts are inert without the backend endpoints (which are excluded).
# assetsApi.ts and cmdbTypes.ts are excluded (CMDB is Pro+ paid feature).
frontend/src/lib/access.ts
frontend/src/lib/api.ts
frontend/src/lib/branding.ts
frontend/src/lib/controlFamilies.ts
frontend/src/lib/pushNotifications.ts
frontend/src/lib/useAutoAI.ts
frontend/src/lib/generated/**
frontend/src/lib/apiBase.ts
frontend/src/lib/billing.ts
# EXCLUDED LIB FILES (Paid Features):
# - assetsApi.ts (CMDB asset management — Pro+)
# - cmdbTypes.ts (CMDB type definitions — Pro+)

# ============================================
# ControlWeave SDK
# ============================================
controlweave-sdk/README.md
controlweave-sdk/package.json
controlweave-sdk/src/**
